entryView.title: Serial Port Resource Manager
setting.serialPort.configurations.title: Serial Port Configurations
setting.serialPort.configurations.descri:
Configuration options when opening a serial port. You can add additional options here.
For example `115200n81`
 - Baud rate `115200`
 - Parity `n(n|e|o)`, default is `n`
 - Data bits `8(5|6|7|8)`, default is `8`
 - Stop bits `1(1|1.5|2)`, default is `1`
setting.log.savePath.title: Log Path
setting.log.savePath.description: Set the path to save log files, e.g., `c:\log`. If not set, it defaults to the `log` folder in the extension path.
setting.log.autoSave.title: Auto Save Log
setting.log.timestamp.enable.title: Auto Add Timestamp
setting.log.timestamp.duration.title: Timestamp Interval
setting.log.timestamp.duration.descripti: The minimum interval between timestamps when automatically adding timestamps, in seconds. Default is 20ms
setting.log.defaultAddingTimeStamp.title: Default Add Timestamp
setting.log.defaultAddingTimeStamp.descr: Whether to add timestamps by default when starting log recording
setting.notebook.savePath.title: Notebook Save Path
setting.notebook.savePath.description: Set the path to save notebook files, e.g., `c:\script`. If not set, it defaults to the `script` folder in the extension path.
